sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ بَشَّارُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ حِينَ تُطْعِمُ الطُّيُورَ.
sentences.translation: Bašar se osjeća sretno kada hrani ptice.
sentences.translationEn: Bashar feels happy when she feeds the birds.

sentences.arabic: كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ تَضَعُ لَهَا بَعْضَ الْحُبُوبِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro stavlja im malo žitarica u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Every morning she puts some grains for them in the garden.

sentences.translation: Gleda ih kako jedu i smiješi se.
sentences.translationEn: She watches them eating and smiles.

sentences.translation: Briga o živim bićima čini čovjeka sretnim.
sentences.translationEn: Caring for living creatures makes a person happy.
